data.summary_suggestion: Create a new task in the CRM
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new task in the CRM system. Requires task details including title, description, assignee, and due date. Optional fields may include priority, status, and related deal or contact associations. Returns the newly created task object with a unique task ID and timestamp. The task is immediately available in the system and assigned to the specified user.

message: Operation 'list_pipelines' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description lack domain context. Empty description doesn't explain what pipelines are or what information is returned. data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all sales pipelines configured in the CRM system. Each pipeline represents a sales process with defined stages. Returns an array of pipeline objects containing pipeline name, description, stages, and configuration details. Pipelines define the workflow for managing deals through various stages of the sales process.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack domain context. Empty description doesn't explain what pipelines are or what information is returned. Added domain context about pipelines representing sales processes with stages, clarified return structure, and explained their role in deal management for better AI agent understanding.
